schema_notes: All Claude product GitHub issues tracked across the repo. Updated by /claude-troubleshooting search, scan, and check-all actions. Source of truth for issue status — other files reference /claude-troubleshooting, not individual issues.

issues.title: CLAUDE_ENV_FILE not provided to SessionStart hooks
issues.impact: DISPROVEN: CLAUDE_ENV_FILE works correctly (verified CC 2.1.165) — it is a populated path and append (export KEY=value >> the file) persists across hook invocations. Original empty-string report closed not_planned by Anthropic 2026-04-09.
issues.workaround: None needed — CLAUDE_ENV_FILE functions as documented (see hooks/session-mode.md). XDG state-path keying remains valid for state that must survive --resume, but is not required to work around this issue.
issues.blocked_work: Hook configuration externalization via env vars

issues.title: Contradiction in CLAUDE_ENV_FILE definition between Settings and Hooks documentation
issues.impact: Documentation contradicts actual behavior — confusing for hook developers
issues.workaround: See #15840 workaround

issues.title: Claude Code hangs when accessing large session files (>50MB)
issues.impact: Parsing transcript files in hooks causes hangs on long sessions
issues.workaround: Do not parse transcript in real-time hooks — use state files instead
issues.blocked_work: Transcript-based workflow enforcement

issues.title: Stop hook not firing mid-session reliably
issues.impact: Stop hooks may only fire at session termination, not on every end_turn
issues.workaround: Use Stop as defense-in-depth, not primary enforcement. PreToolUse advisor is primary.
issues.blocked_work: Reliable verification-before-completion enforcement

issues.title: False 'Hook Error' labels cause Claude to prematurely end turns
issues.impact: Successful hooks show error labels — Claude may prematurely abandon work
issues.workaround: Hooks that should be invisible must produce ZERO stdout/stderr on success

issues.title: Hooks stop executing after ~2.5 hours in session
issues.impact: All hooks silently stop firing after ~2.5h — no error, no notification. Possibly fixed.
issues.workaround: Design hooks to degrade gracefully when they stop firing

issues.title: Glob patterns in rules files frontmatter silently fail
issues.impact: YAML array globs in .claude/rules/*.md frontmatter don't filter — all rules load unconditionally
issues.workaround: Accept unconditional loading. Token cost is low.
issues.blocked_work: Per-ecosystem rules scoping

issues.title: PrePlanMode and PostPlanMode Hook Events
issues.impact: Cannot track or enforce plan mode entry/exit via hooks
issues.workaround: None — plan enforcement is advisory only via CLAUDE.md instructions
issues.blocked_work: Plan step enforcement via hooks

issues.title: Deny rules in settings.local.json are not enforced
issues.impact: Deny rules in settings.local.json silently ignored — only settings.json and user-level settings enforce
issues.workaround: Place all deny rules in settings.json (project-level, checked in)
issues.blocked_work: Splitting deny rules between shared and personal settings

issues.title: Path-scoped rules not automatically loaded when working with matching files
issues.impact: Rules in .claude/rules/ subdirectories with paths: frontmatter never load — not even when reading matching files. 10 comments, has repro label.
issues.workaround: Accept unconditional loading for flat .claude/rules/ files. Avoid subdirectories.
issues.blocked_work: Per-ecosystem rules scoping

issues.title: Rules frontmatter format incorrect — globs works, paths with YAML list does not
issues.impact: CSV parser bug — paths: with YAML arrays fail. Official docs show YAML arrays but parser expects CSV.
issues.workaround: Accept unconditional loading. Use paths: with YAML arrays (documented format) for future-proofing.
issues.blocked_work: Per-ecosystem rules scoping

issues.title: Claude Code CLI paths handling in .claude/rules/*.md
issues.impact: Related to #19377 — glob scoping doesn't work
issues.workaround: Same as #19377
issues.blocked_work: Per-ecosystem rules scoping

issues.title: Support cross-platform MCP configuration in plugins
issues.impact: No shell:true support for npx-based MCP servers on Windows
issues.workaround: mcp-launcher.js at tools/mcp-launcher/launcher.js

issues.title: Cross-platform .mcp.json project files
issues.impact: Related to #15562 — npx MCP on Windows
issues.workaround: Same as #15562

issues.title: Windows: MCP servers using npx require cmd /c wrapper
issues.impact: Original report of npx MCP failure on Windows
issues.workaround: Same as #15562

issues.title: MCP Server Connection Fails on Windows — cmd /c wrapper corrupted by CLI parser
issues.impact: npx MCP servers fail on Windows without wrapper
issues.workaround: mcp-launcher.js at tools/mcp-launcher/launcher.js
issues.blocked_work: Removing mcp-launcher.js workaround

issues.title: Native installer: bash hooks resolve to WSL bash.exe instead of Git Bash
issues.impact: Bash scripts resolve to WSL instead of Git Bash on native installer
issues.workaround: mcp-launcher.js uses Node.js instead of bash to avoid this

issues.title: Environment variables from env section not passed to MCP servers
issues.impact: MCP env block may strip process.env — PATH killed for bash but not node
issues.workaround: mcp-launcher.js uses Node.js (already resolved by spawn)

issues.title: MCP tools running sequentially instead of in parallel
issues.impact: Tools to same MCP server serialize unless readOnlyHint:true — by design, not a bug
issues.workaround: Add readOnlyHint:true to read-only tools for parallel execution

issues.title: Permission auto-save uses deprecated colon syntax
issues.impact: Saves Bash(cmd:*) instead of Bash(cmd *) — cosmetic, both work
issues.workaround: Periodically convert colon-syntax entries to space syntax in settings files

issues.title: Link to JSON Schema for settings.json in official docs
issues.impact: $schema field works; docs just don't mention it. Confirmed safe.
issues.workaround: None needed — $schema works correctly

issues.title: Clarify distinction between user-invocable and disable-model-invocation in Skills
issues.impact: Documentation clarified — behavior now documented
issues.workaround: None needed

issues.title: Agent/subagent freezes indefinitely on Opus 4.6 — no timeout, no error, no recovery
issues.impact: Agents freeze indefinitely with no timeout, error, or recovery. Observed on Opus 4.6. Increasing in frequency (March 2026).
issues.workaround: Retry the agent. If stuck, cancel and re-prompt. No programmatic workaround.
issues.blocked_work: Reliable parallel agent workflows

issues.title: Multiple parallel foreground agents freeze after ~15-30 min, unblock on ctrl+b
issues.impact: Parallel foreground agents freeze after 15-30 minutes of execution
issues.workaround: Ctrl+b to move frozen agents to background (unblocks them)
issues.blocked_work: Reliable parallel agent workflows

issues.title: PreToolUse hooks cause agent hang after ToolSearch deferred tool loading
issues.impact: PreToolUse hooks can cause agent hangs specifically after ToolSearch loads deferred tools. Directly relevant to repos with custom hooks.
issues.workaround: None known — design hooks to be fast and avoid interacting with ToolSearch

issues.title: Voice push-to-talk regression: Space key scrolls indefinitely and recording captures no audio (v2.1.83)
issues.impact: Hold Space types spaces instead of activating recording. When recording eventually activates, no audio is captured. Regression from v2.1.81. Affects Windows, macOS, and Linux — cross-platform breakage.
issues.workaround: None — voice mode is unusable in v2.1.83. Type prompts manually. Downgrade to v2.1.81 if voice is critical.
issues.blocked_work: Voice input for Claude Code

issues.title: CLAUDE.md instructions completely ignored after context compaction
issues.impact: CLAUDE.md and rules may not auto-reload after compaction
issues.workaround: SessionStart compact hook reinjects critical context

issues.title: Path-scoped rules in .claude/rules/ load into context globally regardless of paths: frontmatter
issues.impact: All .md files in .claude/rules/ load at session start regardless of paths: configuration. Opposite of #16853 (which is about subdirectory rules never loading).
issues.workaround: Accept unconditional loading. Token cost is acceptable.
issues.blocked_work: Per-ecosystem rules scoping (reducing token cost)

issues.title: Path-scoped rules should load when Write/Edit targets a matching path
issues.impact: Path-scoped rules only load on Read, not Write/Edit — new file creation ignores scoped rules
issues.workaround: Accept unconditional loading so rules are always present
issues.blocked_work: Per-ecosystem rules scoping

issues.title: Path-specific rules do not load in subagents, teammates, or skill-forked contexts
issues.impact: Spawned contexts (subagent, teammate, skill-forked) only see global rules — path-scoped rules never trigger
issues.workaround: Accept unconditional loading so all rules are global and visible to subagents
issues.blocked_work: Per-ecosystem rules scoping in agent workflows

issues.title: Feature request: Invoke statusline command on session start before first assistant response
issues.impact: Statusline area is blank on session start until first assistant response — users think their statusline is broken
issues.workaround: None — by design. Script handles null values gracefully so partial data displays once first render fires

issues.title: Statusline missing rate_limits and context_window on initial render
issues.impact: Initial statusline render (when it does fire) omits rate_limits and context_window — only version, model, workspace, and cost are populated
issues.workaround: Script handles missing fields with jq // 0 defaults — displays partial info until full data arrives after first interaction

issues.title: Claude Code memory traversal should respect git worktree boundaries
issues.impact: Worktrees nested under .claude/worktrees/ cause parent directory traversal to find the main repo's .claude/rules/ in addition to the worktree's own copy. Every rule file loads twice — 2x context overhead on every tool call. With path-scoped re-injection (#32057), duplicated rules are injected repeatedly throughout the session.
issues.workaround: None — worktree directory location is hardcoded by CC. Accept the duplication. Impact is context waste, not incorrect behavior (content is identical).
issues.blocked_work: Efficient context usage in worktree sessions

issues.title: Allow projects to exclude inherited .claude/rules/ from parent directories
issues.impact: No mechanism to exclude inherited rules from parent directories. Monorepo and worktree setups load rules from every ancestor .claude/rules/. Quantified: 24-36% wasted context in multi-language setups.
issues.workaround: None for worktrees (path is hardcoded). For monorepos: move rules outside .claude/rules/ in ancestors.
issues.blocked_work: Per-project rule isolation in monorepos and worktrees

issues.title: Rules re-injected as system-reminders on every tool call, consuming ~46% of context window
issues.impact: Rules with paths: frontmatter are re-injected as system-reminder blocks on every tool result, not loaded once. In a 30-tool-call session, this consumed ~93K tokens (46% of 200K context). Combined with #16600 (worktree double-loading), the multiplier is severe.
issues.workaround: Accept unconditional loading. Keep rule files concise. The token cost compounds with worktree duplication (#16600).
issues.blocked_work: Efficient context usage with scoped rules

issues.title: Notification hook fires ~8 seconds after permission prompt appears
issues.impact: Notification hooks fire with ~8s delay after permission prompt. On Windows CLI, firing is intermittent. Desktop notifications unreliable for real-time alerting.
issues.workaround: Accept intermittent or delayed notifications; this is CC's event-emission timing. The hook script runs when the event fires, and terminal channels (BELL + OSC 9) carry the alert. No user-side fix.
issues.blocked_work: Reliable desktop notification workflow

issues.title: Notification hook not triggered in Plan Mode when AskUserQuestion is called
issues.impact: Notification hook does not fire in Plan Mode on Windows. Stop hook works, Notification does not.
issues.workaround: None for Plan Mode. Only affects Plan Mode.

issues.title: Notification hook not firing in Claude Desktop
issues.impact: Notification hook does not fire in Claude Desktop app. Works in terminal CLI.
issues.workaround: Use terminal CLI instead of Desktop app for notification hooks

issues.title: initialPrompt not auto-submitted when using --agent flag
issues.impact: Agent YAML frontmatter `initialPrompt` does not fire when starting session via `claude --agent <name>`; session opens at `>` prompt with no auto-submitted turn. Feature shipped in v2.1.83 docs but never actually functions.
issues.workaround: Pass the prompt as a positional argument: `claude --agent <name> "<prompt>"` — functionally different (one-shot, no auto-prepend on every session start).
issues.blocked_work: Evaluation of `initialPrompt` for future main-session agent use cases (scheduled runners, cloud headless sessions, autonomous E2E orchestrators — all tracked in #250).

issues.title: Feature request: Expose session ID as $CLAUDE_SESSION_ID environment variable
issues.impact: Anthropic shipped CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID (with _CODE_ infix) in Bash subprocess as of v2.1.132+; bare CLAUDE_SESSION_ID name still does NOT exist. /en/env-vars docs page still missing the entry as of v2.1.146 (2026-05-20). Hooks/scripts using bare ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID} get empty string
issues.workaround: Use ${CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID} (with _CODE_ infix) in Bash subprocess. Doc gap tracked in melodic-software/medley#851. Hook subprocess availability varies by CC version — verify with env grep first
issues.blocked_work: Simpler hook state keying (still blocked because stdin .session_id drifts mid-session per #12235)

issues.title: No way to access session ID from within a running session
issues.impact: Duplicate of #25642 — same request, closed

issues.title: Session ID changes when resuming a conversation via --resume
issues.impact: Integrations tracking sessions by session_id break across --resume
issues.workaround: Do not key on session_id. Use CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR + git branch as the stable identity for any integration that must survive --resume.
issues.blocked_work: Session-identity-based external integrations

issues.title: PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks do not fire for subagent (Agent tool) tool calls
issues.impact: Compliance/safety hooks silently bypass subagent work. Read-only audit hooks miss subagent activity
issues.workaround: Do not rely on PreToolUse/PostToolUse enforcement for subagent calls. Our 5 agents are read-only so this is informational for us
issues.blocked_work: Policy enforcement via hooks for Agent-tool work

issues.title: Feature request: Dedicated ~/.claude/tmp/ directory with session-scoped temp file management
issues.impact: Cloud container /tmp lifecycle can evict files written there mid-session
issues.workaround: If a hook needs persistence, write to the XDG state path (${XDG_STATE_HOME:-$HOME/.local/state}/medley/ on Linux/macOS, %LOCALAPPDATA%\medley\ on Windows) — not /tmp.

issues.title: Background tasks ignore $TMPDIR and hardcode /tmp/claude/
issues.impact: $TMPDIR environment override is ignored for background task state
issues.workaround: Do not rely on $TMPDIR for background-task scratch paths. CC writes background-task output to a fixed location and surfaces it via the completion notification — Read that path directly.

issues.title: claude --remote cloud sessions orphaned
issues.impact: Cloud sessions may disappear mid-session without warning
issues.workaround: No user-side workaround. Push commits to origin frequently so work survives the session, and prefer interactive sessions for long arcs.

issues.title: Cannot uninstall plugin: enabledPlugins false ignored, plugin re-installs every session
issues.impact: enabledPlugins: false is partially honored; removing entries from installed_plugins.json is reverted every session. Confirmed for document-skills@anthropic-agent-skills and playwright@claude-plugins-official.
issues.workaround: Accept /doctor noise for disabled-but-registered plugins. Never run 'claude plugin marketplace remove' (cascade-purges enabledPlugins per claude-code-quirks.md).

issues.title: /plugin marketplace add: failed clone pollutes local cache and blocks retries
issues.impact: Failed marketplace or submodule clone leaves temp_git_* directory, blocking retries. Affects cockroachdb@claude-plugins-official.
issues.workaround: Manually delete stale temp_git_* dirs under ~/.claude/plugins/cache/. fix-plugins.sh step 4 handles it automatically.

issues.title: Stream idle timeout / partial response during long tool-use turns (Opus 4.7, 1M and non-1M)
issues.impact: Long Opus thinking pauses (>90s) trigger 'API Error: Stream idle timeout - partial response received', killing the turn. Worse on Opus 4.7 1M context due to longer reasoning. Affects CLI, Web, Desktop, mobile. Root cause: SDK drops API ping events (anthropic-sdk-typescript#998) so watchdog cannot distinguish thinking from hang. v2.1.104 regression made fallback fail user-visible.
issues.workaround: CLI: set CLAUDE_STREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 (10min) in settings.json env block, OR remove CLAUDE_ENABLE_STREAM_WATCHDOG=1 entirely. Web/Desktop: split work into smaller chunks; no env var available.

issues.title: Scheduled tasks ignore model setting, always run on Sonnet 4.6
issues.feature: Cloud routines / scheduled tasks model selector
issues.impact: Cloud routines run on Sonnet 4.6 regardless of UI selection. update_scheduled_task MCP schema lacks model field. settings.json model not consulted. Spawns CLI with literal --model default which resolves to Sonnet server-side.
issues.workaround: Cloud routines: NO workaround. Desktop only: edit scheduled-tasks.json on disk after full quit. Architectural: split Opus dispatcher (local) + Sonnet routines (cloud).
issues.blocked_work: Overnight cloud routines depending on Opus 4.7 1M reasoning quality

issues.title: Opus 4.7 1M max-effort silently self-downgrades to Sonnet 4.6 mid-session AND /compact does not fire at context limit
issues.impact: Opus 4.7 1M sessions silently swap to Sonnet 4.6 at context wall. /compact published recovery path does not execute. Confirmed in cron-driven cloud routine sessions. Operator only knows post-fact via /model query.
issues.workaround: Architectural split: Opus dispatcher (non-agent, thin) + Sonnet workers/routines (agent mode, do work). Dispatcher never accumulates context to hit wall.
issues.blocked_work: Long-running Opus 4.7 1M routines without operator monitoring

issues.title: Scheduled Claude Routine stalls on deferred tool schema loading — requires manual input to continue
issues.feature: Cloud routines / ToolSearch deferred MCP schema loading
issues.impact: Scheduled routines using Gmail/GDrive/Slack connectors block on every ToolSearch call waiting for human 'continue'. Routines never finish unattended. 1.5h delays per run reported.
issues.workaround: Pre-declare every MCP tool name in .claude/settings.json permissions.allow. Avoid deferred-schema connectors in routine prompts. Stick to git/gh/file ops.
issues.blocked_work: Routines using Gmail/GDrive/Slack/Atlassian connectors

issues.title: Multi-agent runtime needs mechanical enforcement: 9 gaps that defeat unattended overnight operation
issues.feature: Autonomous overnight cloud routines + orchestration tool permissions
issues.impact: Cron-fired wakes hit permission walls on Agent/TaskCreate/Cron*/Monitor/PushNotification/RemoteTrigger/Skill(*)/ScheduleWakeup/AskUserQuestion. Bash/Write wildcards do not cover them. No permissions.includeAgentOrchestrationTools setting exists.
issues.workaround: Manually pre-declare all 9 orchestration tools in settings.json permissions.allow. Avoid sub-agent dispatch in cloud routines. Use linear scripts.
issues.blocked_work: Cloud routines that dispatch sub-agents or use AskUserQuestion

issues.title: Auto mode: contextual LLM permission judge denies explicitly authorized actions and read-only verification calls
issues.impact: Auto mode LLM judge overrides explicit permissions.allow entries. Even read-only ops get denied. Compounds with cloud routine perm walls.
issues.workaround: Use defaultMode: bypassPermissions when feasible. For routines, do not rely on auto mode + LLM judge.
issues.blocked_work: Auto-mode reliance for orchestration sessions

issues.title: Skill model: pin inherits parent 1M context flag, blocking on Sonnet without /extra-usage
issues.impact: Skills with model: sonnet frontmatter (e.g. /retro, /architect, /quality-gate) fail with 'API Error: Extra usage is required for 1M context' when invoked from Opus 4.7 1M session. Parent's [1m] context flag inherits to spawned subagent regardless of subagent's chosen model, forcing claude-sonnet-4-6[1m] which requires separate extra-usage entitlement.
issues.workaround: Switch session model to non-1M variant before invoking skill (/model claude-opus-4-7 without [1m]). No skill-frontmatter or settings.json fix — bug is in subagent context inheritance path.
issues.blocked_work: Skill-driven /retro, /architect, /quality-gate workflows on Opus 4.7 1M sessions; agent dispatch (code-reviewer, security-reviewer etc.) when session is 1M variant

issues.title: Subagent inherits parent's context window size instead of model default
issues.impact: Root cause for the skill-model-pin / extra-usage cluster. Subagent spawned via skill model: frontmatter, agent frontmatter, or Agent tool call inherits parent session's context window flag (e.g. [1m]) regardless of the subagent's resolved model. Forces sub-model into 1M variant; if sub-model lacks 1M entitlement => 'Extra usage required for 1M context' error.
issues.workaround: Same as #55274 — drop parent session [1m] suffix before invoking subagent. No per-subagent override available.
issues.blocked_work: Multi-tier model strategy on 1M Opus sessions

issues.title: claude-code-action fails when actions/checkout uses persist-credentials: false
issues.impact: Action runs `git fetch origin <ref>` in setupBranch BEFORE configureGitAuth, so persist-credentials: false (zizmor `artipacked` mitigation) breaks the action with `fatal: could not read Username for 'https://github.com'`. continue-on-error: true masks the failure as green but leaves an orphan tracking comment on every PR.
issues.workaround: Drop `persist-credentials: false` from actions/checkout step + add trailing `git config --unset-all http.https://github.com/.extraheader || true` step with `if: always()` to scrub token after action completes. Trade-off: token in .git/config during action runtime (~5min); restored zizmor compliance post-action.
issues.blocked_work: Restoring `persist-credentials: false` for full zizmor `artipacked` compliance during action runtime

issues.title: Internal error: directory mismatch for tsconfig.json fd 4 - fails on every run
issues.impact: Action logs `Internal error: directory mismatch for directory '.../claude-code-action/<ref>/tsconfig.json', fd 4` before any tool dispatch and exits 1. Regression landed ~2026-04-26 22:50 UTC. Switching action ref/SHA does not fix it.
issues.workaround: None known on consumer side. Bug is internal to action's runtime initialization. Combined with #1236, continue-on-error: true masks both failures as green in gh pr checks.
issues.blocked_work: AI code review on PRs (review action fails before invoking Claude)

issues.title: Claude is not informed about shallow clone limitations; no user-configurable fetch depth
issues.impact: Action uses hardcoded fetch-depth=20 (or commits+1) without telling Claude. On older history queries Claude may hit `bad object` errors without realizing the clone is shallow.
issues.workaround: Aware of the limitation; review prompt scopes to PR diff only via `gh pr diff` which doesn't need history beyond PR base.

issues.title: Sonnet dispatched via Agent tool fails with "1M context required" error
issues.feature: Agent tool subagent dispatch from 1M-context parent
issues.impact: From an Opus 4.7 parent session, Agent tool dispatch with model:sonnet OR model:opus fails immediately at 0 tokens with 'Usage credits required for 1M context'. Haiku dispatch still works. Breaks the documented 'Opus orchestrates, Sonnet codes' pattern AND any multi-skill EPIC that fans out subagent work (e.g. /compress wave dispatch).
issues.workaround: Three options: (a) /model switch to non-1M variant then /clear and resume; (b) /usage-credits enable (paid extra-usage); (c) model:haiku dispatch only — limited but functional for mechanical tasks; (d) wait for upstream fix.
issues.blocked_work: Multi-skill EPIC fan-out (e.g. a multi-skill EPIC PLAN.md Wave 1+ dispatch); any /architect parallelism analysis recommending subagent fan-out from a 1M-context parent.

issues.title: Max plan: 'Usage credits required for long context requests' on standard 400k context
issues.impact: Related regression — Max plan users hit credit-gate errors on standard context. Companion to #61681. Both landed 2026-05-23.
issues.workaround: Same as #61681.
